title: Leyland Granocryl Smooth Masonry, Magnolia, 5L
seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by Bob jobs paints.
features: Covers up to approx 50 sq m per 5L tin.
For best results use two coats.
description: From the manufacturer Smooth Masonry Granocryl by Leyland A high quality masonry paint, specially formulated to provide excellent covering power, outstanding durability and all weather protection for exterior walls. For use on exterior brickwork, concrete, roughcast, rendering, pebbledash and other similar surfaces Key Features Smooth finish For exterior use only Durable, all weather protection Mould and odor blocking Tough & Protective With a 10 year life, Granocryl is designed to protect your outdoor surfaces. Perfect for masonry surfaces Suitable for use on: Brickwork, concrete, roughcast, rendering, pebbledash and other similar masonry surfaces 12 colours available Available in: Magnolia, Mushroom, Spray Blue, Black, Brilliant White, Cream, Fern, Grey Skies, Red Brick, Sandstone, Seastone, Soft Gold
